questions.q: According to reports from mid-April 2026, Meta is preparing to cut 8,000 jobs. This represents roughly what percentage of its global workforce?
Which parent company of popular home shopping TV networks recently filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in April 2026 to restructure billions in debt?
Netflix's Q1 2026 net income jumped 83% largely thanks to a $2.8 billion deal-termination fee from which major studio?
Following intense social media backlash and a petition from employees, the CEO of which coffee chain issued a formal apology and restored Pride flags in its stores?
Surging demand pushed delivery dates into May for Apple's newest entry-level laptop, the MacBook Neo. What is its starting price?
